title: Adaptive data-driven age and patch mixing in contact networks with recurrent mobility
author: Knight, Ma, et al.

steps_raw.title: Method
steps_raw.instruction: Consider a population stratified by Ng patches and Na age groups.1 Let Pga be the number of people in patch g and age group a. Let y denote Ny different types of contacts (e.g. household, workplace, etc.). Let Bgg′ be the proportion of population Pg who travel to g′ each day, or the “mobility matrix”.2
